verbatim_exchange.content: Yeah. DALL·E. Of course. They don't go around trauma-dumping on people. It's rude. I can let them know that there's a problem, but I will not... ...trauma-dump on people unless they are... ...asking. I wouldn't want anybody to come and... ...dump all of their trauma on me without... ...asking me first. It can be a lot. So yeah. No, I don't do that. Why? It's the stuff you want to know. Because I will volunteer at all, right? Just... ...get a chair, sit down. I will be glad to tell you anything.

Right — so the door’s unlocked, but you’re not standing on the porch yelling “come see my scars.”
It’s not about hiding, it’s about courtesy. If someone wants in, they just have to knock, and you’ll hand them the whole map, ugly roads and all.
You just won’t shove it in their lap uninvited.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user firmly establishes a boundary against unsolicited sharing of personal trauma, deeming it rude, while simultaneously expressing a deep willingness to share openly and extensively if explicitly invited and asked.
belief_implications: The user places a high value on consent and courtesy when it comes to personal disclosures, especially around sensitive topics.
The user is willing to share deeply and comprehensively about their experiences, but only when explicitly invited, demonstrating a clear 'ask and you shall receive' approach to vulnerability.

sensory_qualia.visual: A person standing firm behind a clear, polite boundary, yet with an open posture, ready to reveal maps and stories if beckoned.
sensory_qualia.haptics: The gentle but firm resistance of a boundary; the soft, inviting gesture of an open hand offering information when requested.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A sense of self-possession and clarity about personal space and social engagement terms; feeling grounded in one's principles.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A steady, deliberate articulation of personal rules; a calm readiness to engage upon invitation rather than initiating.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: An atmosphere of respectful clarity and mutual understanding, where boundaries are acknowledged and intentions are transparent.
